items.zh: npm 或 yarn 套件管理器
Anthropic API Key（免費註冊取得）
終端機 / 命令列工具

description.zh: 用 Homebrew 是最簡單的方式。如果你還沒有 Homebrew，先裝它再裝 Node.js。
description.en: Homebrew is the easiest way. If you don't have Homebrew yet, install it first, then install Node.js.

steps.code:
# 安裝 Homebrew（如果還沒有）
/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"

# 安裝 Node.js
brew install node

# 或用 nvm（推薦，可管理多版本）
curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.1/install.sh | bash
nvm install --lts

note.zh: 建議用 nvm，之後切換 Node 版本比較方便。
note.en: We recommend nvm for easy Node.js version management.

description.zh: 一行指令搞定。這會把 Claude Code 裝成全域指令。
description.en: One command does it. This installs Claude Code as a global CLI tool.

note.zh: 如果遇到權限問題，前面加 sudo。
note.en: If you get a permission error, prefix with sudo.

description.zh: 到 Anthropic 官網註冊帳號，拿到 API Key 後設定為環境變數。
description.en: Register at Anthropic's website, get your API Key, then set it as an environment variable.

steps.code:
# 設定環境變數（加到 ~/.zshrc 讓它永久生效）
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"' >> ~/.zshrc
source ~/.zshrc

note.zh: 把 your-api-key-here 換成你自己的 Key。不要把 Key 分享給別人。
note.en: Replace your-api-key-here with your actual key. Never share your API Key.

description.zh: 跑一下版本指令，確認裝好了。
description.en: Run the version command to confirm everything is installed.

description.zh: 進到你的專案資料夾，執行 init 讓 Claude 了解你的 codebase。
description.en: Navigate to your project folder and run init so Claude understands your codebase.

note.zh: Claude 會自動掃描專案結構，第一次可能需要幾秒鐘。
note.en: Claude will auto-scan your project structure. First run may take a few seconds.

description.zh: 直接在終端機跟 Claude 對話，它可以讀寫你的程式碼、跑指令、修 bug。
description.en: Chat with Claude directly in your terminal. It can read/write your code, run commands, and fix bugs.

steps.code:
# 在專案目錄中啟動 Claude
claude

# 或直接給它一個任務
claude "幫我檢查這個專案有沒有 bug"

note.zh: 輸入 /help 可以看所有可用指令。
note.en: Type /help to see all available commands.

description.zh: 從 Node.js 官網下載安裝檔，或用 winget 一行搞定。
description.en: Download from the Node.js website, or use winget for a one-liner install.

steps.code:
# 用 winget 安裝（推薦）
winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS

# 或從官網下載：https://nodejs.org

note.zh: 安裝完後重新開啟終端機，讓 PATH 生效。
note.en: Restart your terminal after installation so PATH takes effect.

description.zh: 打開 PowerShell 或 Windows Terminal，執行安裝指令。
description.en: Open PowerShell or Windows Terminal and run the install command.

note.zh: 如果遇到權限問題，用系統管理員身分開啟終端機。
note.en: If you get a permission error, run the terminal as Administrator.

description.zh: 到 Anthropic 官網拿 API Key，然後設定為系統環境變數。
description.en: Get your API Key from Anthropic's website and set it as a system environment variable.

steps.code:
# PowerShell（當前 session）
$env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = "your-api-key-here"

# 永久設定（需要系統管理員）
[System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'your-api-key-here', 'User')

note.zh: 永久設定後需要重新開啟終端機才會生效。
note.en: After setting permanently, restart your terminal for it to take effect.

description.zh: 確認 Claude Code 安裝成功。
description.en: Confirm Claude Code is installed successfully.

description.zh: 切到你的專案資料夾，讓 Claude 開始了解你的程式碼。
description.en: Navigate to your project folder and let Claude learn your codebase.

note.zh: Windows 上建議用 Windows Terminal 或 VS Code 內建終端機。
note.en: On Windows, we recommend Windows Terminal or VS Code's built-in terminal.

description.zh: 在終端機裡直接跟 Claude 互動，開始寫 code。
description.en: Interact with Claude directly in your terminal and start coding.

steps.code:
# 在專案目錄中啟動
claude

# 直接下指令
claude "review this project for security issues"

note.zh: 輸入 /help 查看所有指令。

description.zh: 用 nvm 安裝最彈性，也可以用系統套件管理器。
description.en: nvm is the most flexible option. You can also use your system package manager.

steps.code:
# 用 nvm 安裝（推薦）
curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.1/install.sh | bash
source ~/.bashrc
nvm install --lts

# 或用 apt（Ubuntu/Debian）
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y nodejs npm

note.zh: apt 裝的版本可能比較舊，建議用 nvm。
note.en: apt may install an older version. nvm is recommended for the latest LTS.

description.zh: 用 npm 全域安裝 Claude Code。
description.en: Install Claude Code globally via npm.

note.zh: 如果遇到 EACCES 權限錯誤，不要用 sudo npm。改用 nvm 或修正 npm 權限。
note.en: If you get EACCES errors, don't use sudo npm. Use nvm or fix npm permissions instead.

description.zh: 把 API Key 加到你的 shell 設定檔，這樣每次開終端機都會自動載入。
description.en: Add your API Key to your shell config so it loads automatically on every terminal session.

steps.code:
# Bash
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"' >> ~/.bashrc
source ~/.bashrc

# Zsh
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"' >> ~/.zshrc
source ~/.zshrc

note.zh: 確認你用的是哪個 shell：echo $SHELL
note.en: Check which shell you're using: echo $SHELL

description.zh: 進到專案目錄，讓 Claude 掃描你的程式碼結構。
description.en: Enter your project directory and let Claude scan your code structure.

note.zh: Claude 會自動分析專案，給你最相關的建議。
note.en: Claude will auto-analyze your project and provide relevant suggestions.

description.zh: 開始跟 Claude 協作寫 code。
description.en: Start collaborating with Claude on your code.

steps.code:
# 啟動 Claude
claude

# 帶任務啟動
claude "explain the architecture of this project"

note.zh: 輸入 /help 查看完整指令列表。
note.en: Type /help for the full command list.

question.en: How do I get an API Key?

answer.zh: 到 console.anthropic.com 註冊帳號，進入 API Keys 頁面就能建立。新帳號有免費額度可以試用。
answer.en: Sign up at console.anthropic.com, go to the API Keys page and create one. New accounts come with free credits to get started.

question.zh: Claude Code 支援哪些 IDE？
question.en: Which IDEs does Claude Code support?

answer.zh: Claude Code 是 CLI 工具，在任何終端機都能用。它也有 VS Code 和 JetBrains 的擴充套件，可以直接在 IDE 裡面使用。
answer.en: Claude Code is a CLI tool that works in any terminal. It also has extensions for VS Code and JetBrains IDEs for in-editor usage.

answer.zh: Claude Code CLI 本身免費安裝。使用時會消耗 API 額度，新帳號有免費額度。之後按用量計費，一般開發用量每月幾美元。
answer.en: The Claude Code CLI is free to install. Usage consumes API credits — new accounts get free credits. After that, it's pay-as-you-go, typically a few dollars per month for normal development use.

question.en: What if I get permission errors?

answer.zh: macOS/Linux：用 nvm 安裝 Node.js 可以避免大部分權限問題。不要用 sudo npm install。Windows：用系統管理員身分開啟終端機。
answer.en: macOS/Linux: Using nvm to install Node.js avoids most permission issues. Don't use sudo npm install. Windows: Run terminal as Administrator.

question.en: Can I use it with existing projects?

answer.zh: 可以。進到任何專案資料夾執行 claude，它會自動讀取專案結構。支援幾乎所有程式語言和框架。
answer.en: Yes. Navigate to any project folder and run claude — it will auto-detect your project structure. Supports virtually all languages and frameworks.

question.en: How do I install MCP Skills?

answer.zh: 在 Skills 目錄頁找到你要的 Skill，點進詳情頁會有安裝指令。通常就是在 Claude 的設定檔加上對應的 MCP server 設定。
answer.en: Find the Skill you want in the Skills Directory, click into its detail page for install instructions. Usually it's just adding the MCP server config to your Claude settings.

question.zh: Claude Code 和 Claude Desktop 有什麼不同？
question.en: What's the difference between Claude Code and Claude Desktop?

answer.zh: Claude Desktop 是圖形介面的聊天 app。Claude Code 是命令列工具，專門為開發者設計，可以直接讀寫你的程式碼、執行指令、操作檔案系統。
answer.en: Claude Desktop is a GUI chat app. Claude Code is a CLI tool designed for developers — it can directly read/write your code, execute commands, and interact with your file system.
